fix: use service role key for all Supabase reads (bypass RLS)

RLS is enabled on all Supabase tables but no SELECT policies exist for
the anon role. All read functions now use supabaseAdmin (service role key)
which bypasses RLS, ensuring data from admin updates shows on landing pages.

Tables affected: projects, home_page, about_page, what_i_offer_page,
contact_page, pages, settings, blogs

commit.message:
refactor: remove dead code, unused modules and stale TODO comments

Delete abandoned design-phase modules:
- src/worker/ (TaskManager/CompressionTask/ProgressUpdate never used)
- src/engine/registry.rs (CodecRegistry bypassed by direct create_encoder)
- src/engine/codec/jxl.rs, svg.rs (stub encoders that only bail!)
- src/engine/preprocess/color.rs, quantize.rs (empty/todo! placeholders)

Remove unused trait and types:
- Codec trait (name/formats never called after registry removal)
- EncodeParams::output_format(), OutputFormat, ResizeParams, CompressionOptions
- CompressionResult.original_size/output_format, EncodedOutput.format
- GpuAccelerator::supports_compute(), i18n::current_language()

Clean up all impl Codec blocks and unused imports across 10 codec files.
Remove stale TODO comments in WGSL shaders (implementations are complete).
Fix Slint padding warnings by moving padding to layout elements.

Result: zero warnings, zero errors on cargo build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 새로만들기 메뉴 개편 + NoCode 비주얼 쿼리 빌더 구현

새로만들기 메뉴
- 질문: /questions/pick (테이블/컬렉션 선택 흐름)
- SQL 쿼리: /questions/new (기존 NotebookEditor)
- 대시보드: /builder

질문 선택 흐름 (/questions/pick)
- 테이블 선택: 데이터셋 그리드 → /questions/nocode?dataset=xxx
- 컬렉션에서 선택: /collections 이동

NoCode 비주얼 쿼리 빌더 (/questions/nocode)
- 데이터 섹션: 테이블 칩 + 피커 + ▶ 실행 버튼
- 모드 토글: 원시 데이터 / 요약
- 필터 섹션: 컬럼/연산자/값 + "필터 더하기" 버튼 (Metabase 스타일)
- 요약 섹션: 집계함수(COUNT/SUM/AVG/MIN/MAX) + 메트릭 + (으)로 + 그룹화
- 정렬/행수 제한 옵션
- 시각화 버튼 → 결과 차트(막대/선/파이) + 표 전환
- 결과 저장 → 컬렉션 추가 다이얼로그 연동

- 관리자 페이지: 지정업체 등록/수정 JS 기능 추가 (toggleShopEdit, saveDesignatedShop, loadDesignatedShop)

- 직원 페이지: 하드코딩된 업체 정보 제거, Firebase에서 동적 로딩으로 변경

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: admin changes now reflect immediately on landing pages

- Fix critical revalidatePath bug: home page was calling revalidatePath('/home')
  instead of revalidatePath('/') so the home page cache was never invalidated
- Change all public pages from ISR caching (60s/3600s) to revalidate=0 so
  every request fetches fresh data from Supabase immediately after admin updates
- Add revalidate=0 to blogs page which had no revalidation (was statically
  generated and never showed new blog posts)
- Add Supabase storage domain to next.config.ts remotePatterns so images
  hosted on Supabase load correctly in Next.js Image components

Use useState+useEffect for client-side role param detection

window.location. Using useEffect ensures the iframe src updates
on the client after hydration.

commit.message:
소모품 알림 항목 확대 + 지정 정비업체 안내 + 정비 요청/승인 시스템

1. MAINTENANCE_INTERVALS 5개→11개 확대 (타이어위치교환, 배터리, 브레이크오일, 냉각수, 미션오일, 점화플러그 추가)
2. 점검/교체주기에 지정 정비업체 안내 카드 추가 (경영관리팀 지정)
3. 정비 요청 기능 추가 (B안): 직원이 타이어/워셔액/엔진오일 등 요청 → Firebase 저장
4. 워셔액 체크리스트 연동 (A안): 워셔액 체크 시 '부족-보충요청' 서브옵션, 제출 데이터에 플래그 포함
5. 관리자 페이지: 정비 요청 현황 테이블 + 승인/완료 처리 기능
6. 관리자 체크리스트: 워셔액 부족 시 '💦 워셔액 요청' 뱃지 표시

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(storyforge): add 5 deep systems to push toward 9.5 rating

- Narrative memory: rolling AI summary every 5 turns for long-game coherence
- Companion depth: unique abilities + personal quests with loyalty-gated reveals
- Consequence branching: past decisions gate future choices with visible markers
- Ending variety: 5 ending types (victory/bittersweet/pyrrhic/death/escape) with
  what-if replay hints based on player stats and decisions
- Quick restart: reuse same character build on death, skip wizard entirely

commit.message:
fix(ci): pass ubuntu_flavor prompt + add emoji to workflow name

promptStringOnce blocks in non-interactive CI (no TTY → EOF).
Pass --promptString ubuntu_flavor=server to chezmoi init to pre-answer

## Phase 4: 単語帳機能
- FolderListView: フォルダ一覧・作成・削除・リネーム（長押しコンテキストメニュー）

- Source URL タップでブラウザタブへジャンプ

- メモ欄追加（SavedWord.memo フィールド）

commit.message:
feat(nvim): replace Codeium+Gen.nvim with codecompanion.nvim

Add olimorris/codecompanion.nvim as the unified multi-provider AI chat
and inline editing plugin, replacing Exafunction/codeium.vim and
David-Kunz/gen.nvim.

Providers configured:
- API (optional, auto-selected based on env vars): Anthropic Claude,
  OpenAI/Codex, Google Gemini, Mistral, Ollama (always available)
- ACP agents (reuse CLI auth, no extra keys): Claude Code, Gemini CLI,
  OpenCode, Mistral Vibe, Codex

Default adapter is picked automatically at startup: first provider whose
API key is present in the environment, fallback to Ollama.

Remove lazyvim.extras.ai.copilot-chat (replaced by codecompanion chat).
Keep lazyvim.extras.ai.copilot for inline ghost text completions.

Update README with AI stack documentation and optional key setup guide.

commit.message:
perf(storyforge): chunked paragraph TTS for faster narration start

Split scene text into paragraphs and fire TTS for the first paragraph
immediately. Remaining paragraphs are requested in parallel and queued
for sequential playback after the first chunk finishes. This shaves
~1-2s off perceived narration delay since shorter text generates faster.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix snapshot sorting docs for -N suffix convention

The -N suffix (e.g., 2026-03-09-2.json) sorts before the base
filename because '-' (ASCII 45) < '.' (ASCII 46). Document
that .json must be stripped before sorting.

it.fails() to it().

feat: Phase 3.5 + バグ修正・UI改善

## Phase 3.5: 解説シート内の単語長押し
- LongPressTextView.swift 追加
  - UITextView + UILongPressGestureRecognizer で単語を検出
  - AutoSizingTextView サブクラスで intrinsicContentSize を自動計算
  - layoutSubviews() で NavigationStack プッシュ後の高さ崩れを修正
- WordDefinitionContentView.swift 追加
  - Definition・Example を LongPressTextView で表示
  - 自身の WordDefinitionViewModel で独立して辞書検索
- WordDefinitionSheet.swift を NavigationPath 対応に刷新
  - navigationDestination で単語定義をネスト遷移
  - Set<String> で同一単語の重複プッシュを防止

## バグ修正
- NavigationStack プッシュ時にテキストがシート外にはみ出す問題を修正
  （bounds.width=0 時に UIScreen.main.bounds.width をフォールバックとして使用）

## UI改善
- Definition・Example の読み上げボタンをブルーに統一（ダークモードでの視認性向上）

Hero SVG uses hero_ prefixed IDs to avoid conflicts on same page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Metabase 스타일 4대 기능 구현 (홈/탐색/대시보드/컬렉션)

Phase A: 인프라 훅
- useRecentlyViewed: 페이지 방문 기록 (localStorage)
- usePinnedItems: 즐겨찾기 관리
- useCollections: 컬렉션 CRUD (localStorage, mock-data 초기화)
- useAutoRefresh: setInterval 래퍼

Phase B: 홈화면 개편
- QuickActionBar: 새 질문/대시보드/탐색/컬렉션 빠른 액션
- RecentlyViewedSection: 최근 방문 항목 가로 스크롤
- PinnedSection: 즐겨찾기 항목 그리드
- layout.tsx: pathname 변경 시 자동 방문 기록

Phase C: 컬렉션 CRUD
- CreateCollectionDialog: 이름/아이콘/색상 선택
- AddToCollectionDialog: 컬렉션 선택 추가
- MoveItemDialog: 다른 컬렉션으로 이동
- CollectionItemCard: Star/Pin/이동/삭제 액션 추가
- collections/page.tsx: useCollections 훅 연결, 새 컬렉션 버튼 활성화
- collections/[id]/page.tsx: 동적 데이터, pin/remove/move 연결

Phase D: 데이터 탐색 개편
- BrowseFilterPanel: 컬럼 기반 필터 UI
- DataPreviewChart: WidgetRenderer 인라인 차트
- ColumnStats: 측정값 min/max/avg 통계
- BrowseDatasetClient: Server/Client 분리, 필터+차트+통계 통합

Phase E: 대시보드 목록
- DashboardGallery: 갤러리 뷰 (홈 설정/삭제/열기)
- AutoRefreshSelector: 자동 새로고침 드롭다운
- dashboards/page.tsx: 대시보드 목록 페이지
- TopNav: 분석 메뉴에 대시보드 항목 추가
- BuilderClient: ?load= 파라미터 처리, AutoRefresh 연결

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
